text: The MSN messenger xlet shall allow the end user to see online friends.
The MSN messenger xlet shall allow the end user to chat with online friends.
The MSN messenger xlet shall allow the end user to see which TV program their buddies are watching.
The application shall allow the user to login to the messenger using an existing Passport account.
The application shall allow the end user to change and maintain their presence status.
The application shall provide a list of statuses for the end user to select from.
The application shall display the presence status of the end user's buddies.
The application shall update a buddy's status when that buddy changes it.
The application shall allow the end user to change their own nickname.
The application shall display the nicknames of buddies on the buddy list.
The application shall update a buddy's nickname in the contact list when the buddy changes it.
The application shall allow the user to assign a preferred nickname to a specified buddy.
The application shall allow the user to add a buddy to the buddy list.
The application shall allow the user to delete a buddy from the buddy list.
The application shall allow the user to block specific buddies.
The application shall provide a visible notification when an incoming message is received.
The application shall display incoming messages on the screen.
The application shall allow the user to create and send a message to a buddy.
The application shall display emoticons in incoming and outgoing messages.
The application shall provide a list of emoticons for the user to select from during message composition.
The application shall display the message history for the current chat session.
The application shall allow the user to participate in group conversations with multiple buddies.
The application shall allow the user to request the TV program or channel currently being watched by an online buddy.
The application shall show a notification when new e-mail is received in the user's Hotmail inbox.
The application shall display the user's Hotmail account inbox.
The application shall display Hotmail e-mails on the screen.
The application shall allow the user to play games with online buddies.
The application shall use the .NET messenger service protocol for communication.
The application shall utilize MSNPv8 as the communication protocol version.
The application shall support a Remote Control as an input device.
The application shall use the TV screen as the output device.
The application shall be an MHP version of the MSN Messenger application.
